items.name: Bubbly Sit [3.0]
items.description:
For 3.0 Avatars
This asset's purpose is to not sway others to buy, but to serve as an alternative version to that of original emote for those who cannot use the emote originally due to the limitations of their body proportions.
If your avatar is big please buy the original version here:  https://www.roblox.com/catalog/112758073578333/Bubbly-Sit
However, if you prefer smaller body proportions buy this version.
